alt: Incredibly detailed historical kakapo specimen showcasing robust adult body structure
caption: Males utilize a unique lek breeding system, gathering in bowl-like hollows to produce deep booming calls that echo for kilometers.
attributionText: Photo by Auckland Museum Collections from Auckland, Aotearoa New Zealand via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0

acquisitionNotes: Excellent structural shot demonstrating adult male lek profile. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/5d/Strigops_habroptilus_%2848720023116%29.jpg
